welcome.subject: User Registration
welcome.message: Thank you for joining City Catalyst. We're excited to have you on board and help you make a positive impact on your city's sustainability journey.
welcome.footer: If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to contact our support team.

reset-password.subject: Reset Your Password
reset-password.title: Forgot your password?
reset-password.message: Reset it by clicking the button below:
reset-password.linkText: Or copy this link to your browser's URL bar:
reset-password.footer: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.

invite.subject: City Invitation
invite.title: You've Been Invited to Join City Catalyst
invite.message: {{inviterName}} ({{inviterEmail}}) has invited you to join City Catalyst. Click the button below to create your account.
invite.footer: Open Earth Foundation is a nonprofit public benefit corporation from California, USA. EIN: 85-3261449

project-created.subject: Project Creation
project-created.title: Project added to {{organizationName}} account
project-created.message: The {{projectName}} project has been added to your account with {{cityCount}} city slots.
project-created.footer: Open Earth Foundation is a nonprofit public benefit corporation from California, USA. EIN: 85-3261449

account-frozen.subject: Account Frozen
account-frozen.title: Your Account Has Been Frozen
account-frozen.message: Your CityCatalyst trial has officially ended**, and your account is now frozen. But this doesn’t have to be goodbye. Here are your next steps:
account-frozen.ready-to-upgrade-message: Unlock full access to all your projects and features
account-frozen.ready-to-talk-cta: Schedule a quick call with our team
account-frozen.survery-text: We’d love to hear about your experience.
account-frozen.survery-raffle-draw: By participating, three fortunate consultants will be selected to each receive a complimentary one-year license for CityCatalyst.
account-frozen.footer-1: CityCatalyst is designed to help cities and consultants move faster, smarter, and together, and we’d love to support your work for the long haul.
account-frozen.footer-2: If you have any questions or need help choosing the best plan, just reply to this email.
account-frozen.footer: Open Earth Foundation is a nonprofit public benefit corporation from California, USA. EIN: 85-3261449

account-unfrozen.subject: Account Activated
account-unfrozen.title: Your Account Has Been Activated
account-unfrozen.message: Your account has been activated. You can now access all features and continue working on your projects.
account-unfrozen.contact: If you have any questions, please contact us at {{email}}
account-unfrozen.footer: Open Earth Foundation is a nonprofit public benefit corporation from California, USA. EIN: 85-3261449

city-slot-changed.message: The city slot limit for project '{{projectName}}' has been changed to {{cityCount}}.
city-slot-changed.footer: This is an automated message, please do not reply.

admin-invite-accepted.subject: Welcome to CityCatalyst! 🎉 let’s get started.
admin-invite-accepted.preview: Welcome to CityCatalyst! 🎉 let’s get started.
admin-invite-accepted.title: Welcome to CityCatalyst!
admin-invite-accepted.message: We’re happy to have you onboard. Here’s how to get the most out of CityCatalyst:
admin-invite-accepted.step2: Invite your team members as collaborators
admin-invite-accepted.step3: Customize your workspace with your logo and colors
admin-invite-accepted.footer-1: Need a hand? We’re here to help, please reach out to citycatalyst@openearth.org with questions!
admin-invite-accepted.footer-2: Let’s make local climate data work harder, together.
admin-invite-accepted.footer: Open Earth Foundation is a nonprofit public benefit corporation from California, USA. EIN: 85-3261449

hiap-ranking-ready.subject: HIAP Ranking Ready
hiap-ranking-ready.title: Your mitigation actions are ready!
hiap-ranking-ready.message: Your city's greenhouse gas inventory has been processed, and we've identified the Top 20 mitigation actions tailored for your city. These actions will support your journey towards a low-carbon future.
hiap-ranking-ready.message2: You can now view and explore these actions through the CityCatalyst platform.
hiap-ranking-ready.message3: Click the button below to access your mitigation actions table — this personalized page contains detailed actions your city can take to reduce emissions and build climate resilience.
hiap-ranking-ready.footer: Open Earth Foundation is a nonprofit public benefit corporation from California, USA. EIN: 85-3261449

action-plan-ready.subject: Action Plan Ready
action-plan-ready.preview: Your climate action plan is ready!
action-plan-ready.title: Your climate action plan is ready!
action-plan-ready.message: We've generated a draft implementation plan for the climate action '{{actionName}}' as requested. These guidelines will support your journey towards a low-carbon future.
action-plan-ready.message2: You can now view and explore your draft at the CityCatalyst platform.
action-plan-ready.message3: Click the button below to access your generated plans and explore each action in depth.
action-plan-ready.footer: Open Earth Foundation is a nonprofit public benefit corporation from California, USA. EIN: 85-3261449
